title: Song of Resurrection
description: Tested in BSL-Shader. Actived lab-pbr 1.3 in the shader you use. POM is balanced for BSL-Shader default POM settings only.Currently i woring on 4 Versions. x128, x256, x512 and x1024.
body:
This resource pack enhances the visual experience of Minecraft by providing a cohesive, high-quality redesign of core game textures while fully preserving the original gameplay mechanics. The goal of the project is to improve visual clarity, immersion, and aesthetic consistency without changing how the game is played.

Tested in BSL-Shader. Actived lab-pbr 1.3 in the shader you use. POM is balanced for BSL-Shader default POM settings only.Currently i woring on 4 Versions. x128, x256, x512 and x1024.
**You can download all Versions on Google Drive.**
[https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/19-rLHCyPKnTemQ2t7r0F4Gvjp851fGg8?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/19-rLHCyPKnTemQ2t7r0F4Gvjp851fGg8?usp=sharing)
